news.t: Love your stock-index fund? It might be time to spice up your investment strategy.
How a more-focused growth index can cut your risk in the stock market
The S&P 500 is too tech-heavy. This alternative ETF keeps beating it.
These ‘Deep Value' Stocks Are Ready to Bounce Back
AI Ranks Invesco S&P SmallCap 600 Pure Value ETF Best Smart Beta ETF
Not All Value ETFs Are Created Equal. Here's How to Choose a Winner.

holdings.infoBox: RPV is an equity ETF with a total of 126 individual holdings. The top holdings are Centene stock at 2.54%, Bunge Global at 2.39%, Humana at 2.24%, Archer-Daniels-Midland Company at 2.20%, and Dow Inc. at 2.09%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 Pure Value ETF (RPV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500/Citigroup Pure Value index. The fund tracks an index of primarily large-cap, committee-selected US stocks. The index covers about 33% of the S&P 500's market cap, using three factors to select value stocks. RPV was launched on Mar 1, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.

data.text: After growth's long ascendancy, value shares are getting their day in the sun. To determine which have the best prospects, check for factors including liquidity, quality, size, and momentum.
